allow: PowerShell(python -c "from vizhi.installer import get_settings_path, load_settings, save_settings, install_hook, uninstall_hook; from vizhi.cli import main, install_hook_cmd, uninstall_hook_cmd; print\('OK'\); print\(get_settings_path\(\)\)")

PowerShell(python -c "from vizhi.installer import install_hook, uninstall_hook; import json; s = {'permissions': {'allow': ['Bash']}}; s, dup = install_hook\(s\); print\('install#1 dup=', dup\); print\(json.dumps\(s, indent=2\)\); s, dup = install_hook\(s\); print\('install#2 dup=', dup\); s, gone = uninstall_hook\(s\); print\('uninstall#1 gone=', gone\); print\(json.dumps\(s, indent=2\)\); s, gone = uninstall_hook\(s\); print\('uninstall#2 gone=', gone\)")
